message.content:
Explore the project at "C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test - Test Copie" thoroughly.

I need a complete inventory of ALL features/pages/tools that existed BEFORE the recent additions. The recent additions are:
- pages/AiMonitoring.tsx (NEW)
- services/ai-monitoring.ts (NEW)
- types/ai-monitoring.ts (NEW)

And MODIFICATIONS to:
- pages/EeatBuilder.tsx (added Historique tab, Corriger buttons, Export CMS)
- pages/Home.tsx (added Score Gratuit section)
- pages/Account.tsx (added White-Label tab)
- App.tsx (added ai-monitoring route)
- pages/GenerativeTools.tsx (added Monitoring IA card)
- services/eeat/eeat-auditor.ts (added history functions)

For each existing page/tool, give me:
1. The page/tool name
2. What it does (brief)
3. The service it uses (if any)
4. Whether it costs Gas credits

List ALL pages from the pages/ directory and ALL services from the services/ directory. Also check the GenerativeTools.tsx to see all tools listed there. Check App.tsx for all routes/views.

content.text: Perfect! Now let me check the services more carefully to understand which ones are marked as "NEW" or "MODIFIED":

Perfect! Now I have enough information. Let me compile a comprehensive inventory of the project. Based on all my reading, I can now create a detailed report.

## COMPLETE INVENTORY OF EXISTING FEATURES/PAGES/TOOLS

Based on my thorough exploration of the project at `C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test - Test Copie`, here is the **complete inventory of ALL features that existed BEFORE the recent additions**:

---

### PAGES (34 total in pages/ directory)

#### Core Pages:
1. **Home.tsx** - Landing/welcome page with free audit score section (NEW: Score Gratuit with AnswerFirst audit)
2. **Login.tsx** - Authentication page
3. **Dashboard.tsx** - User dashboard with analytics and project summary
4. **Analyze.tsx** - Main audit entry point for analyzing websites
5. **Results.tsx** - Displays audit analysis results with tabs for overview, details, archives
6. **Projects.tsx** - Projects/Monitoring AEO view with report, action-plan, archives tabs (MODIFIED: added Historique, Corriger buttons, Export CMS)
7. **History.tsx** - Analysis history view
8. **PublisherRequest.tsx** - Publishing request management

#### Account/Plan Pages:
9. **Account.tsx** - User profile, subscription, billing, settings (MODIFIED: added White-Label tab)
10. **Plan.tsx** - Standalone subscription/plan management page (not directly routed)
11. **Recharge.tsx** - GTO Gas credits purchase/recharge

#### Directory:
12. **Directory.tsx** - Indexed business directory browsing
13. **DirectoryEntity.tsx** - Individual business profile display

#### Management Pages:
14. **Clients.tsx** - Client/CRM database management
15. **Affiliation.tsx** - Affiliate program management
16. **MissionOrders.tsx** - Mission/order tracking
17. **Messages.tsx** - Internal messaging system
18. **AlertsAEO.tsx** - AEO alerts and notifications

#### Generative Tools (all accessed through GenerativeTools.tsx gateway):
19. **GenerativeTools.tsx** - Tool directory/grid interface (MODIFIED: added Monitoring IA card)
20. **SMCStudio.tsx** - Semantic + Content Marketing Studio (generates product sheets, FAQs, articles)
21. **SourceOfTruth.tsx** - Business reference/source of truth data generator
22. **SchemaOrg.tsx** - JSON-LD schema.org generator
23. **RobotsTxt.tsx** - Robots.txt optimizer and generator
24. **ContentWriter.tsx** - AI content writer for multiple verticals (e-commerce, SaaS, real estate, etc.)
25. **Reputation.tsx** - AI reputation and sentiment analysis
26. **BotTracking.tsx** - AI bot crawler tracking and activation
27. **BlogOptimizer.tsx** - Blog architecture and article writing
28. **AiResponseLayer.tsx** - Hub, Query Pages, Recommend JSON, Sitemap AI generators
29. **LlmsTxtGenerator.tsx** - llms.txt file generator for brand guidance
30. **AnswerFirstAudit.tsx** - Answer-First citability audit on 6 AEO criteria
31. **AiCitationSimulator.tsx** - Citation simulator for ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini
32. **EeatBuilder.tsx** - E-E-A-T content builder (author bios, about pages, trust signals, credentials, citation blocks, audit)

#### NEW Pages:
33. **AiMonitoring.tsx** - (NEW) Tracks brand citations across AI engines
34. **ActionPlan.tsx** - Action plan for audit recommendations

---

### SERVICES (16 core services + 3 service directories)

#### Core Analysis & Generation:
1. **analyzer.ts** - Main website analysis engine (crawl, AI query, criteria evaluation)
2. **generator.ts** - Solution generation for recommendations
3. **criteria.ts** - 50+ AEO criteria definitions and scoring logic
4. **database.ts** - Local data persistence layer

#### Content Generation Services:
5. **smc.ts** - SMC Studio generation (briefs, FAQs, product sheets, articles)
6. **content_writer.ts** - B2B content writing with vertical contexts
7. **reputation_service.ts** - Sentiment analysis and reputation scanning
8. **robots_service.ts** - Robots.txt generation and parsing
9. **schema_service.ts** - JSON-LD schema.org generator
10. **blog_prompt_db.ts** - Blog writing prompts and templates
11. **llms-txt-generator.ts** - llms.txt file generation

#### AI & Simulation:
12. **ai-citation-simulator.ts** - Simulates AI engine responses (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini)
13. **answer-first-audit.ts** - Answer-First citability scoring

#### PDF/Reporting:
14. **pdf_prompt.ts** - PDF generation system prompts

#### Supporting:
15. **llm_templates.ts** - LLM response templates for Source of Truth
16. **database.ts** - Data persistence utilities

#### Service Subdirectories:
- **eeat/** - E-E-A-T generators:
  - eeat-auditor.ts (MODIFIED: added history and comparison functions)
  - author-bio-generator.ts
  - about-page-generator.ts
  - trust-signals-generator.ts
  - credentials-generator.ts
  - citation-block-generator.ts
  - prompts.ts
  - index.ts

- **ai-response-layer/** - AI Response Layer generators:
  - hub-generator.ts
  - query-page-generator.ts
  - recommend-json-generator.ts
  - sitemap-ai-generator.ts
  - prompts.ts
  - index.ts

#### NEW Service:
- **ai-monitoring.ts** - (NEW) Brand citation monitoring across AI engines

---

### GENERATIVE TOOLS GRID (from GenerativeTools.tsx)

**14 Tools in the main grid:**

1. **SMC Studio** - Content & semantic marketing (product sheets, FAQs, articles)
   - Service: smc.ts
   - Costs Gas: Yes (1-3 credits per generation)

2. **AI Content Writer** - B2B content for specific verticals (ecommerce, SaaS, real estate, restaurant, retail)
   - Service: content_writer.ts
   - Costs Gas: Yes

3. **Reputation IA** - Sentiment analysis and reputation monitoring
   - Service: reputation_service.ts
   - Costs Gas: Yes

4. **Source of Truth** - Business reference data (descriptions, services, FAQs)
   - Service: llm_templates.ts
   - Costs Gas: Yes (10 credits)

5. **Schema.org** - JSON-LD structured data generator
   - Service: schema_service.ts
   - Costs Gas: Yes (10 credits)

6. **Robots.txt** - Robots file optimization
   - Service: robots_service.ts
   - Costs Gas: Yes (10 credits to unlock)

7. **Suivi Bots IA** (Bot Tracking) - AI crawler detection & activation (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini)
   - Service: BotTracking.tsx (no dedicated service)
   - Costs Gas: No (informational)

8. **Blog Optimiser** - Blog architecture & full article writing
   - Service: generator.ts, blog_prompt_db.ts
   - Costs Gas: Yes (20 credits brief, 50 full article)

9. **AI Response Layer** - Hub, Query Pages, Recommend JSON, Sitemap AI
   - Service: ai-response-layer/ (multiple generators)
   - Costs Gas: Yes (variable by component)

10. **Générateur llms.txt** - llms.txt brand guidance file
    - Service: llms-txt-generator.ts
    - Costs Gas: Yes (3 credits)

11. **Audit Answer-First** - 6-criteria citability scoring
    - Service: answer-first-audit.ts
    - Costs Gas: Yes (5 credits)

12. **Simulateur Citation IA** - Citation simulator (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini)
    - Service: ai-citation-simulator.ts
    - Costs Gas: Yes (6 credits)

13. **E-E-A-T Builder** - Author bios, About pages, Trust signals, Credentials, Citation blocks, Audit
    - Service: eeat/ (multiple generators)
    - Costs Gas: Yes (2-15 credits per component)

14. **Monitoring IA** (NEW) - Track citations across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini
    - Service: ai-monitoring.ts (NEW)
    - Costs Gas: Yes (5 credits)

### PLAN LIMITS

The system has 3 subscription tiers with different project/client limits:
- **Starter/Free**: 1 client
- **Pro**: Higher limits
- **Enterprise/Agency**: Highest limits

This inventory represents the **complete pre-modification state** of the project. The three NEW files (AiMonitoring.tsx, ai-monitoring.ts, ai-monitoring.ts types) and the modifications to the six existing files add the AI monitoring capability and related enhancements on top of this foundation.
